aboutBLW.title: About BLW
aboutBLW.description: Banaras Locomotive Works (BLW), Varanasi is a Production Unit of Indian Railways, operational since August 1961. Located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, BLW is India's premier locomotive manufacturing unit — producing diesel and electric locomotives ranging from 1350 HP to 6000 HP for Indian Railways, Non-Railway Customers, and export markets. BLW is certified under IRIS (ISO 22163), ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001 and 5-S standards.
